title: Things to Do in Boone NC This Weekend | April 2026
excerpt: Spring has fully arrived in the NC High Country, and this weekend is packed with reasons to fall in love with Boone all over again. Whether you're a first-time visitor or quietly wondering what it might look like to own a piece of these mountains, read on.
image_alt: Downtown Boone NC in spring with blooming trees along King Street and the Blue Ridge Mountains in the background
